creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
PVS Studio reported the following warnings:

/usr/src/sys/cam/scsi/scsi_ch.c:746:1: warning: V1001 The 'softc' variable is assigned but is not used by the end of the function.
/usr/src/sys/cam/scsi/scsi_pass.c:2282:1: warning: V1001 The 'softc' variable is assigned but is not used by the end of the function.
/usr/src/sys/cam/scsi/scsi_enc.c:338:1: warning: V1001 The 'softc' variable is assigned but is not used by the end of the function.
